TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Silong, title = Silong, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Silong} }

S.FORM: alang Silong ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 11 buwan, 34 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 82% kyan ku 28 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 18% kyan ku 6 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 76%, Amis 3%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Silong hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Silong hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Silong hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Silong hya' ga llyung. tay 'llaw na Silong hya' ga Qoyaw. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Silong ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 11 buwan, 34 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 82% kyan ku 28 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 18% kyan ku 6 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 76%, Amis 3%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Silong hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Silong hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Silong hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Silong hya' ga llyung. tay 'llaw na Silong hya' ga Qoyaw. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ s~ɕiloŋ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku toweŋ s~ɕi atu ħos~ɕiŋ ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, ** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na s~ɕiloŋ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na s~ɕiloŋ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕiloŋ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕiloŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔllaw na s~ɕiloŋ ħjaʔ ɣa qojaw. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
